summary: Path-scoped LB matching slice split from PR #2617. It touched six files under src/melee/lb, producing one reported new match for lb_80011E24 and small score improvements in five other LB functions. Changes are mostly local expression, declaration-order, temporary-lifetime, and assignment-shape adjustments.

key_files.role: Adjusted local declaration/order and squared-distance expression shape in lb_8000D148.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists lb_8000D148 improvement from 98.86% to 99.00%

key_files.role: Matched lb_80011E24 by removing an output-pointer alias, reordering locals, and adding PAD_STACK(4); also changed blur offset literal expression in lb_80012994.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/lb/lb_00F9.c hunks for lb_80011E24 and lb_80012994
text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists lb_80011E24 as 1 new match, 98.92% to 100.00%, +6 bytes
text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists lb_80012994 improvement from 99.70% to 99.75%

key_files.role: Inlined a temporary rotation-z variable into HSD_JObjSetRotationZ call in lbBgFlash_80020E38.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists lbBgFlash_80020E38 improvement from 99.05% to 99.10%

key_files.role: Moved dot_diff_cb computation after diff_ba assignments in lbColl_800077A0.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists lbColl_800077A0 improvement from 99.89% to 99.98%

key_files.role: Removed unused var_r26 local from lbDvd_80018254 while preserving existing PAD_STACK(0x18).
Adjusted local declaration order, combined assignment with condition, and introduced abs_dist/abs_param0 temporaries in lbRefract_80021CE8.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists lbRefract_80021CE8 improvement from 98.52% to 99.75%, +7 bytes

what_changed: The PR was scoped to src/melee/lb and split from a larger PR by directory/subsystem for easier review.
lb_80011E24 in lb_00F9.c reached a reported 100.00% match and was listed by decomp-dev as the slice's one new match.
Five unmatched LB functions received reported score improvements: lbRefract_80021CE8, lb_80012994, lbBgFlash_80020E38, lbColl_800077A0, and lb_8000D148.
Most code edits were small source-shape changes: local declaration order, temporary removal/addition, assignment ordering, and expression spelling changes.
git diff --check origin/master...HEAD was reported as passing for this isolated slice.
smart_moves: Kept the PR path-scoped to src/melee/lb, reducing review surface compared with the larger source branch.
Used per-function source-shape changes rather than broad file restructuring.
Relied on decomp-dev reporting for the authoritative per-PR slice score rather than promoting the full unsplit branch report as the final slice result.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For MWCC matching, a direct parameter pointer may produce a different result than copying it through an alias; lb_80011E24 removed the HSD_JObj** out alias and incremented result directly, contributing to the reported function match.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lb_80011E24 replaces out/result alias use with direct result use
text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists lb_80011E24 as 100.00% new match

decomp_lessons.lesson: Small expression spelling differences can matter for matching even when arithmetic is equivalent, as shown by changing blur_size * 0.015625f to blur_size / 64.0f in lb_80012994.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists lb_80012994 improvement

decomp_lessons.lesson: Assignment-in-condition forms and explicit fabsf temporaries may improve a floating-point loop match; lbRefract_80021CE8 combined dist_sq assignment with the if condition and introduced abs_dist/abs_param0 locals.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbRefract_80021CE8 dist_sq assignment moved into if condition
raw_diff: lbRefract_80021CE8 introduces abs_dist and abs_param0
text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists lbRefract_80021CE8 improvement

naming_conventions.convention: Temporary names in this slice remain role-descriptive but local, such as diff_02_x, diff_12_y, dot_diff_cb, diff_ba, abs_dist, and abs_param0; no broad semantic renames were introduced.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Local declaration order and lifetime steering were used in several functions, including moving y_tex earlier in lbRefract_80021CE8 and reordering found/prev in lb_80011E24.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lb_80011E24 found and prev declarations moved

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: PAD_STACK was added narrowly as PAD_STACK(4) in lb_80011E24, which the decomp-dev report later listed as a 100.00% new match.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists lb_80011E24 as new match

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Equivalent arithmetic was respelled to influence codegen: self-multiplication before summing squared distances, division by 64.0f instead of multiplication by 0.015625f, and moving dot-product computation after intervening vector assignments.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs touching lb_80011E24 or PAD_STACK(4) to see whether the stack padding remained necessary.
Search for other blur_size * 0.015625f versus blur_size / 64.0f changes in LB or image code.
Search for assignment-in-condition patterns around dist_sq and __frsqrte in refract or graphics loops.
Compare follow-up PRs under src/melee/lb split from #2617 for similar local-order matching tactics.

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR #2625 metadata, state MERGED, changed-file counts
human_pr_text.md: PR body, scope, local checks, file list, reviewer LGTM
raw_diff: complete diff for six files
text_corpus.jsonl: decomp-dev report and issue comments
notes: The raw PR JSON is truncated, but the loaded human text, changed-file metadata, text corpus, and full raw diff are sufficient for this compact intake.
The PR body's full unsplit source branch report is not treated as final per-slice validation; the decomp-dev PR comment gives the slice-specific function results.
No inline review comments were present in the loaded evidence.
The intake does not infer author intent beyond the body's stated split/reviewability purpose and the concrete diff/report evidence.

accepted_candidate_records.title: lb_80011E24 matched with direct result pointer and narrow PAD_STACK
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2625, lb_80011E24 in src/melee/lb/lb_00F9.c was reported by decomp-dev as a new 100.00% match. The diff removed a separate HSD_JObj** out alias, used result directly for NULL check, stores, and increments, reordered locals, and added PAD_STACK(4).

accepted_candidate_records.title: LB slice expression-shape adjustments improved several near-matches
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2625 shows multiple small expression-shape edits with reported score improvements: division by 64.0f in lb_80012994, inline rotation-z expression in lbBgFlash_80020E38, moved dot_diff_cb computation in lbColl_800077A0, squared-distance reshaping in lb_8000D148, and assignment-in-condition plus fabsf temporaries in lbRefract_80021CE8.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: hunks across lb_00CE.c, lb_00F9.c, lbbgflash.c, lbcollision.c, lbrefract.c
text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists five improvements in unmatched items

source_update_candidates.title: Use PR #2625 as an example for narrow PAD_STACK evidence
source_update_candidates.text: Consider adding PR #2625 lb_80011E24 as an example under matching tactics: PAD_STACK(4) was added narrowly in one function, alongside pointer-alias and local-order changes, and the per-PR decomp-dev report listed that function as a new 100.00% match.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists lb_80011E24 as new match
source_update_candidates.reason: The existing standard already requires evidence for PAD_STACK; this PR provides a compact concrete example, but curator review should decide whether examples belong in the standards source.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the full unsplit branch report numbers as PR #2625's final validation; the PR body says per-PR CI/decomp-dev reporting is authoritative for the slice.
Do not infer a general rule that assignment-in-condition, temporary removal, or PAD_STACK should always be preferred; the evidence supports only these local matching cases.
Do not claim any data-section or split-ownership lesson from this slice; the changed files and report focus on code matching under src/melee/lb.
